label: Generic room resolver
description: Generates a generic room using configurable interior symbol, carpet, and roof settings.

interior.label: Interior symbol
interior.description: BaseGen symbol name resolved against RuleDef.symbol at generation time to populate the room interior. This is not a defName - multiple RuleDefs may share the same symbol for weighted selection.

useRandomCarpet.label: Use random carpet
useRandomCarpet.description: Whether a random carpet floor is applied to the room interior.

allowRoof.label: Allow roof
allowRoof.description: Whether a roof may be placed over the generated room.
